programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a New York Times journalist and author of best-selling novels, returns to the most famous crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Jones conducts his own investigations and reveals unknown facts that have escaped the attention of investigators and prosecutors.To get a full picture of the crime, he talks to the victims' families, representatives of the justice system and serving convicts.Jones deals with, among others,the famous case of the murder of millionaire Bill McLaughlin, in which charges were brought against football player Erick Naposki, and the controversial trial of infanticide Casey Anthony.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a New York Times journalist and author of best-selling novels, returns to the most famous crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Jones conducts his own investigations and reveals unknown facts that have escaped the attention of investigators and prosecutors.To get a full picture of the crime, he talks to the victims' families, representatives of the justice system and serving convicts.Jones deals with, among others,the famous case of the murder of millionaire Bill McLaughlin, in which charges were brought against football player Erick Naposki, and the controversial trial of infanticide Casey Anthony.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The program shows the extremes to which murderers can go to avoid punishment.Each episode presents the stories of criminals who will do anything to hide their crimes and get rid of their victims.

credits.actor: Self - Former Prosecutor Cuyahoga County Prosecutors Office - Tim McGinty

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade
programme.desc: The 1980s are primarily associated with big money and strong characters.The series shows the dark side of this decade in the USA.The country was then flooded with the largest wave of crimes in history.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You 2
programme.desc: Stories of people who committed crimes in the name of love.It turns out that a man in love is not fully sane.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You 2
programme.desc: Stories of people who committed crimes in the name of love.It turns out that a man in love is not fully sane.

programme.title: Disappeared 9
programme.desc: The creators of the program present investigations into mysterious disappearances.Some searches end happily, others have a tragic ending.Each episode is devoted to one missing person.

programme.title: Disappeared 9
programme.desc: The creators of the program present investigations into mysterious disappearances.Some searches end happily, others have a tragic ending.Each episode is devoted to one missing person.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Shocking stories about crimes that happened in small Central American cities.They divided the local inhabitants forever.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.sub-title: Murder at the Beer Can Alley Club
programme.desc: Shocking stories about crimes that happened in small Central American cities.They divided the local inhabitants forever.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Well-known and experienced policeman Joe Kenda reveals the behind-the-scenes of the most brutal and strangest crimes committed in the USA.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Joe Kenda explores cases so unusual that they look more like a Hollywood script than a real investigation.It presents crimes committed in the USA.

programme.title: Last Night in... 2
programme.sub-title: A message from beyond the grave
programme.desc: Shocking stories of brutal crimes that took place after nightfall.

programme.title: Last Night in... 2
programme.desc: Shocking stories of brutal crimes that took place after nightfall.

programme.title: Devil In The Web

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Devil In Suburbia
programme.desc: The police find three bodies in a burned house.The fourth family member cannot be found.Detectives begin an ineffective search for the perpetrator of the crime.The breakthrough comes after 10 years...

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He put me in a dog cage
programme.desc: Stories of people who realize that they have been dealing with a murderer for years.Suddenly they are faced with a choice between loyalty and justice.They must decide which side to choose.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.sub-title: I guess this is the end for me
programme.desc: Mania of grandeur, sadism, artificial charm or lack of empathy are just a few of the signs of psychopathy.In the program, viewers will learn about the most brutal murderers of modern times.

credits.actor: Self - Forensic Psychiatrist - Charles A. Morgan III
Self - John Jay College of Criminal Justice - Chitra Raghavan
Self - Forensic Psychologist - Kostas A. Katsavdakis

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: Mania of grandeur, sadism, artificial charm or lack of empathy are just a few of the signs of psychopathy.In the program, viewers will learn about the most brutal murderers of modern times.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: The program includes behind the scenes of true crimes and confessions of relatives of brutally murdered victims.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: The series tells the story of true crimes and their emotional impact on the victims' loved ones long after the crime has been committed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks 2
programme.desc: Visiting the homes of murderers can give you chills.Conversations with prisoners serving sentences for crimes are a controversial and can be traumatic experience.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Viewers will look into the homes of the killers and meet their families, who often do not suspect anything.Viewers will also see what life is like for perpetrators in prison.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: True crimes will be presented, for which people chasing fame and beauty are responsible.

credits.actor: Self - Former Adult Movie Star - Maddison Callaway
Self - Friend of Courtney - Kristina Santa

programme.title: The Price of Glee
programme.desc: Called a phenomenon and showered with awards, the series "Glee" has forever become a part of the history of American television.Thanks to him, many young actors had an open door to their career.Unfortunately, for some it was the beginning of the end... Today it is known that fate hung over the cast of the show.The first tragedy occurred during the shooting.On July 13, 2013, the star of the production, 31-year-old Cory Monteith, was found dead in a hotel in Vancouver.The cause of death was given as a drug overdose.Then - three years after the last episode of "Glee" aired, in 2018 - the young actor's co-star, Mark Salling, took his own life.In 2020, the media reported the death of another artist associated with the musical, Naya Rivera.The creators of the documentary show the behind-the-scenes life of the cast of the hit, as well as, among others:conversations with Monteith's roommate and Rivera's father.Everyone is looking for an answer to the question: why the success of "Glee" turned out to be both a blessing and a curse.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Extremely experienced crime journalists reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.
